artifacts.title: Identify Open File and Define Task
artifacts.goal: Locate the file currently open in the workspace from recent context and plan the addition of the comment.

artifacts.stdout:
from __future__ import annotations

import subprocess
import sys
from pathlib import Path


ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parent


def _run(cmd: list[str], cwd: Path | None = None) -> None:
    subprocess.run(cmd, check=True, cwd=cwd or ROOT)


def main() -> None:
    argv = sys.argv[1:]

    if "--dashboard" in argv or "-d" in argv:
        _run([sys.executable, "-m", "streamlit", "run", "agent_os/apps/dashboard.py"])
        return

    if "--star-office" in argv:
        backend_dir = ROOT / "Star-Office-UI-1.0.0" / "backend"
        _run([sys.executable, "app.py"], cwd=backend_dir)
        return

    cmd = [sys.executable, "-m", "agent_os.apps.cli", *argv]
    _run(cmd)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

from __future__ import annotations

import subprocess
import sys
from pathlib import Path


ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parent


def _run(cmd: list[str], cwd: Path | None = None) -> None:
    subprocess.run(cmd, check=True, cwd=cwd or ROOT)


def main() -> None:
    argv = sys.argv[1:]

    if "--dashboard" in argv or "-d" in argv:
        _run([sys.executable, "-m", "streamlit", "run", "agent_os/apps/dashboard.py"])
        return

    if "--star-office" in argv:
        backend_dir = ROOT / "Star-Office-UI-1.0.0" / "backend"
        _run([sys.executable, "app.py"], cwd=backend_dir)
        return

    cmd = [sys.executable, "-m", "agent_os.apps.cli", *argv]
    _run(cmd)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
